steps.title: Use the dating evidence
steps.content: Scholars were skeptical that the horned helmets belonged to Vikings. The new radiocarbon dates show the helmets came from the Nordic Bronze Age, centuries before Vikings existed, so the findings support that skepticism.

steps.title: Choose the support verb
steps.content: Choice A means expect beforehand, Choice B means examine closely, and Choice C means make known. The word needed here means show that a belief or doubt is reasonable, which is exactly what the dates do for the skepticism. The answer is D.
